ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tumor_data" (
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor entry */,
  "radius_mean" REAL /* Mean radius of the tumor */,
  "texture_mean" REAL /* Mean texture of the tumor */,
  "perimeter_mean" REAL /* Mean perimeter of the tumor */,
  "area_mean" REAL /* Mean area of the tumor */,
  "smoothness_mean" REAL /* Mean smoothness of the tumor */,
  "compactness_mean" REAL /* Mean compactness of the tumor */,
  "concavity_mean" REAL /* Mean concavity of the tumor */,
  "concave_points_mean" REAL /* Mean concave points of the tumor */,
  "symmetry_mean" REAL /* Mean symmetry of the tumor */,
  "fractal_dimension_mean" REAL /* Mean fractal dimension of the tumor */,
  "radius_se" REAL /* Standard error of radius */,
  "texture_se" REAL /* Standard error of texture */,
  "perimeter_se" REAL /* Standard error of perimeter */,
  "area_se" REAL /* Standard error of area */,
  "smoothness_se" REAL /* Standard error of smoothness */,
  "compactness_se" REAL /* Standard error of compactness */,
  "concavity_se" REAL /* Standard error of concavity */,
  "concave_points_se" REAL /* Standard error of concave points */,
  "symmetry_se" REAL /* Standard error of symmetry */,
  "fractal_dimension_se" REAL /* Standard error of fractal dimension */,
  "radius_worst" REAL /* Worst radius */,
  "texture_worst" REAL /* Worst texture */,
  "perimeter_worst" REAL /* Worst perimeter */,
  "area_worst" REAL /* Worst area */,
  "smoothness_worst" REAL /* Worst smoothness */,
  "compactness_worst" REAL /* Worst compactness */,
  "concavity_worst" REAL /* Worst concavity */,
  "concave_points_worst" REAL /* Worst concave points */,
  "symmetry_worst" REAL /* Worst symmetry */,
  "fractal_dimension_worst" REAL /* Worst fractal dimension */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the tumor (Malignant or Benign) */,
  "tumor_size" TEXT /* Size of the tumor */,
  "tumor_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor */,
  "lymph_node_status" TEXT /* Lymph node status */,
  " margine_status" TEXT /* Margin status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tumor_data table */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the access_control table */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tumor_data table */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each tumor entry
Mean concave points of the tumor
Mean fractal dimension of the tumor
Class of the tumor (Malignant or Benign)
Foreign key referencing the tumor_data table
Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin)
Foreign key referencing the access_control table
Password of the user (hashed for security)

Foreign key referencing the users table
